parsed.summary: Cannot perform a grounded adversarial review: the provided context includes only the commit log, diff stat, and file list — not the actual file contents or unified diff. Any findings about specific line-level defects in retry.mjs, bigmodel-errors.mjs, glm-client.mjs, etc. would be fabricated. The deletion of scripts/lib/process.mjs (67 lines removed) is the strongest signal of potential runtime breakage (stale imports), but confirming it requires reading the surviving source — which is not available here. Approving only because I cannot defend a single material finding from the evidence supplied. A real review of this 6600-line cumulative change must be re-run with file content access.
next_steps: Re-run this adversarial review with access to the actual unified diff or file contents (e.g., via `git diff v0.4.0..v0.4.6` or file-read tools).
Prioritize inspection of retry.mjs (203 new lines of retry/backoff logic), bigmodel-errors.mjs (error classification), and the deletion of process.mjs for stale import breakage.
Verify no surviving code imports from the deleted scripts/lib/process.mjs — a static grep across all .mjs files would catch this.
Check that glm-client.mjs retries are scoped to idempotent operations only and include jitter to avoid thundering-herd retries against BigModel.
